deep_dive.title: Surrogate-Assisted Framework for SI-Compliant Interconnect Design Optimization Using the Earth Mover's Distance
deep_dive.abstract: This work presents a deterministic, machine-assisted framework for SI-compliant PCB design based on the Earth Mover's Distance (EMD). In contrast to conventional surrogate-based optimization methods that rely on iterative black-box search procedures, the proposed approach follows an interpretable, sequential evaluation strategy. Neural surrogate models are first used to efficiently predict waveform describing features from topology-dependent design parameters. A decision tree then acts as a physically motivated quality gate that identifies SI-compliant waveforms according to predefined SI criteria. Within the resulting valid solution space, the Earth Mover's Distance is employed as a similarity metric to rank candidate designs according to their proximity to an ideal reference signal. This enables not only the deterministic identification of admissible parameter regions but also a transparent prioritization of physically superior solutions without inverse modeling or stochastic search procedures. The methodology is demonstrated using a large-scale set of simulated DDR3 fly-by waveforms. By combining surrogate prediction, interpretable classification, and EMD-based waveform evaluation, the framework provides an explainable and computationally efficient alternative to conventional optimization strategies for supporting PCB development with AI-based methods.
deep_dive.llm_evidence_en: surrogate-assisted framework for SI-compliant PCB interconnect design optimization
deep_dive.llm_evidence_cn: 用于SI合规PCB互连设计优化的代理辅助框架
deep_dive.llm_evidence: 用于SI合规PCB互连设计优化的代理辅助框架
deep_dive.canonical_evidence: 用于SI合规PCB互连设计优化的代理辅助框架
deep_dive.llm_tldr_en: Proposes a surrogate-assisted framework using neural networks and Earth Mover's Distance for SI-compliant interconnect design optimization, enabling interpretable and efficient ranking of candidate designs.
deep_dive.llm_tldr_cn: 本文提出一个确定性、机器辅助的框架，用于SI合规的PCB互连设计优化。首先利用神经代理模型从拓扑相关设计参数高效预测波形描述特征，然后决策树作为物理驱动的质量门识别SI合规波形，最后使用地球移动距离（EMD）作为相似性度量对候选设计进行排序。该方法避免了传统黑盒搜索，提供了可解释的优化策略。
deep_dive.llm_tldr: 本文提出一个确定性、机器辅助的框架，用于SI合规的PCB互连设计优化。首先利用神经代理模型从拓扑相关设计参数高效预测波形描述特征，然后决策树作为物理驱动的质量门识别SI合规波形，最后使用地球移动距离（EMD）作为相似性度量对候选设计进行排序。该方法避免了传统黑盒搜索，提供了可解释的优化策略。
